positioning.oneLiner: Replace with a concise description of what this company helps customers do.
positioning.primaryOutcome: Replace with the business result customers care about most.
positioning.category: Replace with the market category or buying frame.

bestFit: Replace with firmographic, technographic, or situational fit criteria.
Replace with the customer maturity level or pain pattern that makes the offer relevant.
poorFit: Replace with disqualifying traits or contexts.
Replace with conditions where the company should not sell.
triggerEvents: Replace with event that creates urgency.
Replace with another event that creates urgency.

offers.name: Primary Offer
bestFor: Replace with use cases or customer segments.
problemsSolved: Replace with problems this offer solves.
offers.deliveryNotes: Replace with delivery model, timeline, constraints, or dependencies.

discoveryQuestions: Replace with a diagnostic discovery question.

proof.source: Replace with source, case study, or internal note.

competitors.name: Alternative Option
competitors.positioningNote: Replace with how to position against this alternative.
